description: Rowe School courts are reserved for Pickleball Sunday, Monday, Wednesdays afternoons from 4-7 pm, and Saturday Morning from 8-11, all other times are first come first severe for pickleball or Tennis.  We ask that if you are playing outside of these tresevered, andpostedtimes, you pull the nets off the courts to be respectful of tennis players when you are done for the day. and loosen the nets please.  Look on the Yarmouth Community Services website for more information.
